heading: Prohibition regarding State aid
label: 7902 Prohibition regarding State aid
text: A State shall not take into consideration payments under this chapter (other than under subchapter VII) in determining the eligibility of any local educational agency in that State for State aid, or the amount of State aid, with respect to free public education of children.
